summary: Gets PDF url for invoice or credit note based on resource_type param
description: Gets PDF url for invoice or credit note based on resource_type param. Endpoint: GET /c/{company_id}/invoices/pdf. Required parameters: company_id. Optional parameters include resource_type.

params.name: resource_type
params.description: Resource type for PDF url: invoice | credit_note

example_request:
GET /c/{company_id}/invoices/pdf

Required params: company_id

Optional params: resource_type
